events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: **fail / high risk**. Wrong compressor oil is an OEM-spec violation that risks compressor seizure and seal failure — the system must be recovered (EPA 609), flushed of the incorrect oil, refilled with the correct OEM-specified oil/refrigerant, and leak/function tested before this can pass the quality gate.
